template.name: suspense_resolve_erroneous_debit
template.description: Reclassify an aged orphaned Suspense balance identified as a bank error by moving the amount from Suspense to Clearing (debit Clearing, credit Suspense), representing cash expected to arrive once the bank posts the correcting entry.

financial_statements_impact.description: Pure asset-to-asset reclassification: Clearing increases and Suspense decreases by the same correction amount. Net impact on total assets is zero.

template.trigger: Investigation determines an orphaned Suspense balance represents a bank erroneous debit and must be reclassified to Clearing pending the bank's correction.

ledger_scope_descriptions.economic_ledger: Economic Ledger (5001) — Clearing and Suspense reconciliation control account scope for erroneous debit reclassification.

accounting_treatments.description: Manual reclassification within reconciliation control accounts to reflect expected correction from the bank (move balance from Suspense to Clearing) without creating a separate receivable.

account_code_validations.description: Clearing asset account to be debited for the reclassification (Master FBO - Clearing).
Suspense / reconciliation mixing bowl asset control account to be credited for the reclassification (Master FBO - Suspense).

bank_dispute_reference.description: Bank's dispute/reference number for the erroneous debit case (e.g. 'BDR-2026-000123').

approver.description: Name or ID of the approver who authorised this reclassification (e.g. 'j.smith' or 'APPROVER_123').

anomaly_type.description: Anomaly classification for this resolution event (must be 'ERRONEOUS_DEBIT').

legs.description: Reclassify an orphaned suspense balance to clearing, pending the bank's correction of the erroneous debit.

examples.name: erroneous_debit_reclassification_1250
examples.description: Erroneous Debit Reclassification — $1,250.00. Bank erroneously debited the FBO master account twice for the same ACH batch. Investigation confirmed duplicate posting. $1,250.00 reclassified from Suspense to Clearing pending bank correction.
